welcomeSubtitle: Manage birth declarations for your hospital
dashboardDesc: Create, submit, and track birth declarations sent to civil status centers.
declarationsDesc: Search and filter all birth declarations for your hospital.
newDeclarationDesc: Complete the form below and submit to the selected civil status center.
editDeclarationDesc: Update declaration details or submit when ready.
certificateReadyDesc: {{count}} declaration(s) have certificates ready for parents to collect.
awaitingCivilStatusDesc: Received, under review, or documents requested
noHospitalAssignedDesc: Your account is not linked to a hospital. Contact a super administrator to assign your hospital.
emptyChart: No declarations yet. Create your first birth declaration to see activity here.
documentsRequestedDesc: The civil status center needs more documents for this declaration. Please coordinate with the parents and upload supporting files.
